description:
Unlike a TagPolicy (a governed-tag *definition*), an assignment is the
 application of a tag to a specific entity. It has no identifier of its own —
 its identity is the composite of (entity_type, entity_name, tag_key).

entity_name.description: The fully qualified name of the entity to which the tag is assigned.

entity_type.description: Supported values: catalogs, schemas, tables, columns, volumes.
entity_type.title: The type of the entity to which the tag is assigned.

title: The assignment of a tag to a lakehouse entity.
